ab: mnwah sami mzuy te tanux kun ki yaya’ mu.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: qlyan ga msryaw balay kayal, ini kkilux ru ini khiyaq uzi, tbasaw balay behuy nya.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: mtama sami mtasiq k’mal maniq Menpaw, ru pbu wagi, hrhul balay.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: babaw knryax ga, mtalah qu kayal la.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: pqutan muw yaya, swa mtalah kayal.
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: kmal yaya, musa mwah hazi behuy wah.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: mhngan ga ungat yulung kayal, mhtuw kwara bengah.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: maki saku ska tuqiy usa ngasal ga, mkura saku bengah pqoyat.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願，
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: inlungan maku ga laxiy uwah behuy, smawya saku musa mzwi na.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
